import fs from "fs";
import { execSync } from "child_process";
import WebSocket from "ws";
import gTTS from "gtts";

// ================= CONFIG =================
const WS_URL = "ws://localhost:3002/plivo/stream";

// ================= STEP 1: TEXT =================
const text = `
Hello.

I want to book an appointment.

Tomorrow evening.

My name is Devansh.
`;

// ================= STEP 2: GENERATE TTS =================
console.log("🎤 Generating audio...");
await new Promise((resolve) => {
    const tts = new gTTS(text, "en");
    tts.save("input.mp3", resolve);
});

// ================= STEP 3: CONVERT TO PCM 16kHz =================
console.log("🔄 Converting to PCM 16kHz...");
execSync(`
ffmpeg -y -i input.mp3 \
-ar 16000 -ac 1 -f s16le output.pcm
`);

// ================= STEP 4: ADD PAUSES =================
// (simulate human gaps → IMPORTANT for END_SPEECH)
const pcmBuffer = fs.readFileSync("output.pcm");

// create silence buffer (~2 sec)
const silenceSamples = 16000 * 2; // 2 sec
const silence = Buffer.alloc(silenceSamples * 2); // 16-bit = 2 bytes

// split into 4 chunks (simulate sentences)
const segmentSize = Math.floor(pcmBuffer.length / 4);

let finalBuffer = Buffer.concat([
    pcmBuffer.slice(0, segmentSize),
    silence,
    pcmBuffer.slice(segmentSize, segmentSize * 2),
    silence,
    pcmBuffer.slice(segmentSize * 2, segmentSize * 3),
    silence,
    pcmBuffer.slice(segmentSize * 3),
]);

// ================= STEP 5: CHUNKING =================
console.log("📦 Chunking...");
const chunkSize = 640; // 20ms @ 16kHz (16bit)
const chunks = [];

for (let i = 0; i < finalBuffer.length; i += chunkSize) {
    const chunk = finalBuffer.slice(i, i + chunkSize);
    chunks.push(chunk.toString("base64"));
}

// ================= STEP 6: STREAM =================
console.log("📡 Connecting...");

const ws = new WebSocket(WS_URL);

ws.on("open", async () => {
    console.log("✅ Connected");

    ws.send(JSON.stringify({
        event: "start",
        start: {
            callId: "69eb343e36edd5d15b0e9e23",
            streamId: "stream-1",
            from: "9999999999",
            to: "8888888888",
            mediaFormat: {
                encoding: "audio/l16", // ✅ MATCHES OLD SCRIPT
                sampleRate: 16000
            }
        }
    }));

    console.log("▶️ Streaming...");

    for (const chunk of chunks) {
        ws.send(JSON.stringify({
            event: "media",
            media: { payload: chunk }
        }));

        await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 20)); // real-time
    }

    console.log("⏹ Done");
    ws.send(JSON.stringify({ event: "stop" }));
});

// ================= RESPONSE HANDLING =================
ws.on("message", (msg) => {
    try {
        const data = JSON.parse(msg.toString());

        if (data.event === "playAudio") {
            console.log("🔊 AI speaking...");
        }

        if (data.event === "clearAudio") {
            console.log("🧹 Interrupt received");
        }

    } catch {
        console.log("📨 Raw:", msg.toString());
    }
});

ws.on("close", () => console.log("❌ Closed"));
ws.on("error", (err) => console.error("⚠️ Error:", err));
